runs.summary: 3 new recipes: Skillet Gnocchi with Sausage & Cherry Tomatoes, Bordeaux-Style Steak Frites, Cereal Milk Panna Cotta
runs.content:
1. Skillet Gnocchi with Sausage, Cherry Tomatoes and Basil — inspired by Lucinda Scala Quinn (Mad Hungry). A one-pan, 25-minute weeknight fix built on peak-season cherry tomatoes.
2. Bordeaux-Style Steak Frites with Peppercorn Sauce — inspired by Anthony Bourdain's classical French training. A weekend technique project: hard sear, double-fried chips, brandy pan sauce.
3. Cereal Milk Panna Cotta — inspired by David Chang / Momofuku's Milk Bar. The wild card: a make-ahead dessert built on steeped cornflake milk.
